steps.title: Convert the increase
steps.content:
A $624\%$ increase means the final mass is the original mass plus $624\%$ of the original mass.
$$100\%+624\%=724\%$$

steps.title: Apply the multiplier
steps.content:
Convert $724\%$ to the decimal multiplier $7.24$. If the original mass is $k$, the final mass is
$$7.24k$$
The answer is A.
